response.justification: Bogdan possesses an outstanding technical background with Staff-level experience at top-tier companies and strong open-source contributions. However, he falls short on a critical hard requirement for the role: a minimum of C1 German proficiency, possessing only 'Basic' German. Furthermore, this is an executive-level leadership position requiring significant client advisory, IT security oversight, and operational team management, whereas Bogdan's resume strongly leans toward an Individual Contributor (IC) track.
strengths: Extensive software development and architecture experience at top-tier tech companies (Google, Meta).
Strong background in open-source technologies, Linux environments, and building complex systems.
Proven track record of technical mentorship through organizing workshops, talks, and coding dojos.
concerns: Does not meet the mandatory German language proficiency requirement (has Basic, needs C1).
Lacks explicit executive-level operational leadership and formal team management experience.
Missing demonstrated experience in IT security, risk management, and compliance considerations.
